target: For example, in case of attack of the superficies by exuberant exogenous pathogens, diaphoretic therapy is indicated; in case of invasion of the upper part of the chest by pathogens, accompanied by accumulation of abundant sputum and saliva, or prolonged retention of food in the gastrointestinal tract, or food poisoning, it is advisable to apply emetic therapy; in case of invasion of the lower part of the gastrointestinal tract by pathogens with pathogenic heat combined with waste products in the intestines, purgation is practiced; in case of sthenic heat-syndrome and sthenic fire-syndrome, heat-clearing and fire-purging therapy is applied; in case of cold-syndrome it is advisable to eliminate pathogenic cold by warming the middle-Jiao; and in case of dampness syndrome it is better to dispel pathogenic dampness by promoting diuresis.
